bird.name: Cryptic antthrush
bird.summary: The cryptic antthrush (Chamaeza meruloides), also known as Such's antthrush, is a species of bird in the family Formicariidae. It is endemi…

locations.name: 巴伊亞州
locations.summary: 巴伊亚（葡萄牙語：Bahia）是巴西的26个州之一，地处东北部。面积565,733平方千米，首府是萨尔瓦多。巴伊亚北部是阿拉戈斯州、塞尔希培州、伯南布哥州和皮奥伊州，东部是大西洋，西部有戈亚斯州和托坎廷斯州，南部有米纳斯吉拉斯州和聖埃斯皮…

locations.name: 圣卡塔琳娜州
locations.summary: 圣卡塔琳娜州（葡萄牙語：Santa Catarina）是巴西南部的一个州，首府弗洛里亞諾波利斯，面积95,346.181平方公里，人口5,958,266人。 参见 胡利亚纳共和国

relations.subject: Cryptic antthrush
relations.evidence: The cryptic antthrush is found in the coastal mountains of southeastern Brazil from southern Bahia to northeastern Santa Catarina

relations.subject: Cryptic antthrush
relations.evidence: The cryptic antthrush is found in the coastal mountains of southeastern Brazil from southern Bahia to northeastern Santa Catarina

relations.subject: Cryptic antthrush
relations.evidence: It inhabits the floor of the interior and edges of humid montane forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Cryptic antthrush
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. One researcher "found [the Cryptic] Antthrush in partially logged forest habitat, suggesting it may be tolerant of some level of human disturbance".Aleixo, A
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
